name: Gopher Hole Golf
address: 260 W Main St Unit 200, Abingdon, VA 24210
about: The Gopher Hole is an indoor sports entertainment lounge combining state-of-the-art golf simulators with full food and beverage service. Play a world-class virtual course, sharpen your swing with a pro instructor, or challenge friends in a relaxed, social setting. The venue is fully open Thursday–Sunday with full service during open hours, plus self-service simulator access available throughout the week for flexible play options.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor EYE X02 simulator technology with photometric cameras
Full-service bar and social lounge atmosphere
Variety of other sports amenities (billiards, ping pong, darts)
Flexible hours including self-service access during the week
Professional golf instruction available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with drink specials during events

simulator_hardware.notes: Precision photometric camera system with three cameras, larger hitting zone, and trouble mat compatibility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as permitted, and the venue offers full food and bar service on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes, but simulator time is typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is The Gopher Hole kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior memberships and is described as a welcoming environment that accommodates families.
